title: Reset an expired password
resolution_summary: Verify identity; use self-service reset; sign out and in; never share passwords.

title: Refresh VPN credentials after password change
resolution_summary: Disconnect VPN; remove cached credentials; sign in with the new password; escalate lockouts.

title: Enroll a replacement MFA device
resolution_summary: Verify identity using an approved method; revoke old device; enroll replacement; confirm sign-in.

title: Unlock a user account
resolution_summary: Check lockout source; verify identity; unlock; require password reset if compromise is suspected.

title: Connect to warehouse Wi-Fi
resolution_summary: Confirm managed device; renew certificate; forget and reconnect; check access-point health.

title: Troubleshoot slow office Wi-Fi
resolution_summary: Check outage dashboard; capture location and time; test wired connection; escalate widespread impact.

title: Replace a damaged laptop
resolution_summary: Record asset ID and damage; back up if safe; obtain approval; issue replacement; update inventory.

title: Fix a docking station display issue
resolution_summary: Reseat cables; power-cycle dock; update firmware; test alternate cable and monitor.

title: Restore a Zebra label printer
resolution_summary: Check media and queue; restart print service; calibrate; escalate hardware faults.

title: Re-enroll a barcode scanner
resolution_summary: Confirm asset ID; connect to managed Wi-Fi; enroll in device manager; sync WMS profile.

title: Request RiceFlow ERP access
resolution_summary: Require manager and data-owner approval; apply least privilege; record approval in ticket.

title: Resolve RiceFlow invoice export errors
resolution_summary: Validate date and entity; retry export; capture error ID; escalate data-integrity issues.

title: Fix GrainTrack inventory sync
resolution_summary: Check service status; identify affected warehouse; preserve transaction IDs; avoid manual duplication.

title: Request ExportHub CRM access
resolution_summary: Obtain manager approval; assign role template; validate customer-data scope; confirm access.

title: Upload a CertiRice certificate
resolution_summary: Validate file type and shipment ID; check permissions; retry; preserve compliance record.

title: Troubleshoot ShipLink tracking
resolution_summary: Check carrier status; validate container reference; refresh integration; avoid duplicate bookings.

title: Restore a deleted SharePoint file
resolution_summary: Check recycle bin and retention; restore correct version; confirm permissions; escalate legal hold.

title: Fix Teams microphone problems
resolution_summary: Select correct input; check OS permission; test call; update driver; try browser client.

title: Report a phishing message
resolution_summary: Do not click; use report-phishing button; preserve message; reset credentials if entered; escalate immediately.

title: Respond to a suspicious login
resolution_summary: Revoke sessions; reset password; verify MFA; preserve logs; open security incident.

title: Handle a lost company device
resolution_summary: Record asset and last location; remote lock; notify Security and manager; assess data exposure.

title: Request software installation
resolution_summary: Confirm business need and license; verify approved catalog; deploy through Endpoint Manager.

title: Onboard a new employee
resolution_summary: Require HR record and manager; create account; assign baseline access and device; verify MFA.

title: Offboard an employee
resolution_summary: Confirm HR request; disable access at effective time; revoke sessions; preserve data; recover assets.

title: Declare a major IT incident
resolution_summary: Confirm multi-user impact; appoint incident lead; publish status; track timeline; conduct review.
